name: Melting Moments # 2
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
In a medium bowl, stir together the flour, cornstarch, and powdered sugar. In a large bowl with a mixer set to medium speed, beat the margarine until smooth. Gradually add the flour mixture and beat until fully combined. Refrigerate for 1 hour. Shape into 1-inch balls. Place about 1 - 1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet; flatten each ball with a lightly floured fork. Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F (150°C) for 20 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned. This recipe makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
